issue.title: 🚨 Time estimate is reset when clicking on the title input field after setting the estimate
issue.body:
### Version Used

17.2.4 (Linux Mint desktop app, Windows 10 desktop app)

### Expected Behavior

When creating a new task, setting a time estimate first and then clicking on the title field to type the task name should preserve the estimate value.

### Current Behavior

If a time estimate is selected from the dropdown *before* the task title is entered, clicking on the title input field immediately resets the estimate to zero.

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Open the add task input area
2. Set a time estimate by selecting a value from the estimate dropdown (e.g. 30m)
3. Click on the title input field to start typing the task name
4. The time estimate is immediately cleared/reset to zero

**Environment**
- Version: 17.2.4
- OS: Linux Mint (desktop app) / Windows 10 (desktop app)
- Sync: Dropbox (3 devices)

### Can you reproduce this reliably?

Yes, I can reproduce it reliably.

### Console Output

```shell

```

### documentation gap

- [ ] The documentation/[wiki](https://github.com/super-productivity/super-productivity/wiki) is unclear or incorrect for this case.
- [ ] There should be a note added to the documentation/[wiki](https://github.com/super-productivity/super-productivity/wiki) for this case.
- [ ] I can help improve the documentation.

fidelityNote: Cold-start in this repo, same as #7219/#7191.
